articles.full_text:
UP monsoon news: Heatwave like conditions to continue in Uttar Pradesh for 2 days, heavy rain likely from…, Lucknow, Prayagraj, Noida, Varanasi, Kanpur, Gorakhpur to…, check full IMD forecast
Rain brought temporary relief to parts of western Uttar Pradesh, while the IMD has forecast heavy showers across the region from July 9.
Rainfall in parts of western Uttar Pradesh, including the Meerut and Agra divisions, brought relief from the heat and humidity on Saturday. However, several low-lying areas also witnessed waterlogging.
Dry spell before rain returns
The IMD expects Sunday and Monday to remain mostly dry, with only light drizzle possible in isolated places. A fresh spell of rain is likely to begin from July 7.
Heavy rain alert
The weather department has issued a heavy rainfall alert for July 9 and 10 and advised people to take precautions during outdoor activities.
Uneven rainfall
While some parts of western Uttar Pradesh received light to moderate showers, many areas remained dry. Heat and humidity are expected to persist in places that missed the rain.
Rain likely from July 8
The IMD has forecast widespread rainfall across Meerut and other parts of western Uttar Pradesh between July 8 and July 10, with temperatures expected to remain warm and humid until then.
Waterlogging woes
A brief spell of rain flooded roads and village lanes in several areas due to poor drainage. Residents fear the situation could worsen if heavy rainfall continues in the coming days.
